target: 5. Hunger Pangs
Huh-huh-huh~♪
Hoine, where are you headed next?

It's a secret!
It's a surprise for when we arrive!
I don't know where the next destination is, but--
Ah…
Was that your stomach growling?

Hahaha!
I was thinking about where to go next, and my stomach started making noise.

(So hungry, huh?
Then maybe the next destination is…
Considering the encounter with Mio earlier…)

Why do bellies make noise anyway?
Are there really bugs inside?

That's impossible.
It's just hunger pangs.
The sound occurs when the contractions of the stomach wall push the contents into the duodenum and small intestine.
Huh, I don't get it.

Don't think it's bugs.
It's fine like this.
Yaaay!
Hizuru, are you hungry?
No, not really…
Ah, it's making noise again.

Hahaha!
What's this, it's making so much noise!
Hahaha!
Hahaha!
I don't get what's so funny, but it'll probably stop once we reach the next destination.
But I don't have any money…

I'll pay.
If it's Kofune, there's enough cash no matter what you order, so don't worry.

Yay!
Thanks, Hizuru!
I can't stand listening to that noise next to me forever…

Wait!
But how did you know it was Kofune?
That's simple deduction.

You're so cool!
Hizuru, you really are amazing!

Look!
My stomach's even surprised!

Remember what I just explained.
It's just a physiological reaction.
Welcome!
I'm coming!

Ah, Hoine.
And…
Alain, it's been a while.
Hizuru! You're back on the island?

Yeah, I just arrived today.
It's good to see the shop is still open.

Thanks to you.
I'm glad you're doing well, Hizuru.

So, what are you doing today?
Watching over Hoine?
Unfortunately, that's what's happening…

Hoine, don't hold back.
Order whatever you want.
Then I'll have a parfait!
Will that be enough?

Right!
Then two parfaits!

Hahaha!
You look so embarrassed!

…Children are so inexplicable and unpredictable.
I have no idea how to handle them.

Yeah, that's true.
Mio and Ushio used to give me a hard time too.
Hizuru, you'll understand when you have kids.
W-what?

If Hoine had a daughter, it wouldn't be strange for her age.
There's probably at least one good person out there.

That's none of your business!
Hurry up and bring the parfait!
Understood, two parfaits.
Ah, wait, two is too much--
Yay~!

Sorry for the wait.
Two parfaits, coming right up.

One for Hoine.
The other for me.

Wait?
Can't I eat both?

If you need more, order something else.
But no cold things, it'll make your stomach colder.

Yaaay!
Then, I'm eating!

Mmm! So good!
Hizuru, eat quickly!

Don't worry about me.
Focus on eating.
Yaaay!
(That should calm down a bit)

(The island scenery, but also…
This shop hasn't changed at all)
(It's the same as when I was in my teens)

(If I look back, it's like…
Those days' me and Asako are there…
It feels like that)

(Time reversal…
Such things can't actually happen)

(There's no such thing as something unchanging in this world,
Everything is destined to change over time)

(But because of that--
Returning to the past is also a universal human dream)

(Time reversal, return… 
That's also a good theme)
Thank you for the meal!

Hm?
You're done already?

Yeah, it was super delicious!
I'm full now!
…That's good.

(Despite all that noise,
A parfait could satisfy you?)

(Children's stomachs are that big, I guess…
I've forgotten what I was like back then)

Alain, thank you.
I'll leave the payment on the table.
Ah, next time we can chat properly.

Yeah.
Then we'll end it here today.
Bye~!
